seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The email must include at least two reasons for requesting the extension.
new_constraint: Do not include any reasons for requesting the extension.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The email must include at least two reasons for requesting the extension. Do not include any reasons for requesting the extension.
response:
Subject: Extension Request - [Your Name] - [Course Name] Project

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension on the [Project Name] project, which is currently due in two days, on [Original Due Date].

I have been working diligently on the project, but I am finding that I need a little more time to ensure I can submit my best possible work.

Would it be possible to have an extension until [Propose New Date, e.g., end of the week, or a specific date]?

Thank you very much for considering my request. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]<turn|>
